name: yearn-for-mines
description: Agentic system using MCP to control a Minecraft bot with MemPalace memory and local LLM

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @yearn-for-mines/shared build && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up mempalace -d 2>/dev/null || true && concurrently --names mcp,web,agent --prefix-colors cyan,green,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm dev:mcp" "pnpm dev:web" "MCP_MEMPALACE_URL=http://localhost:8081/mcp pnpm dev:agent"
scripts.dev:webstack: pnpm --filter @yearn-for-mines/shared build && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up mempalace -d 2>/dev/null || true && concurrently --names mcp,web --prefix-colors cyan,green --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm dev:mcp" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.dev:all: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up mempalace -d 2>/dev/null || true && bash scripts/dev.sh
scripts.dev:all:agent: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up mempalace -d 2>/dev/null || true && MCP_MEMPALACE_URL=http://localhost:8081/mcp bash scripts/dev.sh --with-agent
